ocr_findings.description: 並列システム diagram: image shows embedded calculation text within the figure ('並列システムの稼働率＝1－(1－0.9)×(1－0.8)＝0.98') and 複合システム diagram shows inline calculations (システム①の稼働率＝0.9×0.8＝0.72, システム②の稼働率＝0.98, 複合システムの稼働率≒0.71); these numeric calculation annotations inside the figures are lost in OCR (both diagrams replaced with img placeholders)

reviewer_notes: Page covers 並列システム and 複合システム with reliability formulas and example diagrams. The LaTeX formula for parallel system availability is correctly captured. However, both system diagrams contain inline calculation annotations that are educationally important (concrete numeric examples showing 0.98 and 0.71 results) and these are entirely absent from the OCR output since the figures were replaced with image placeholders.
